Our Partners

A trusted partner to those who care

Nursing partners and doctors are the most trusted names in home healthcare. CuralinkPlus is built to support them first.

🏥

Medical Partners

The trusted foundation of home healthcare. Run your operations with confidence, dispatch your team, and track every case — all from one dependable dashboard.

  • Live staff tracking & dispatch
  • Multi-patient monitoring
  • Automated billing & payouts
  • Emergency one-tap response
🩺

Doctors & Specialists

Stay connected to every patient with confidence. Review cases, prescribe remotely, and collaborate directly with the care team — reliable oversight, wherever you are.

  • Live patient case dashboard
  • Remote consults & prescriptions
  • Direct nurse communication
  • Vitals & care history access
👩‍⚕️

Independent Care Team

Nurses, caretakers & attendants — manage bookings, build a respected reputation, and grow, with dignified tools that match your dedication.

  • Smart job matching
  • Live navigation & check-ins
  • Verified profile & ratings
  • Transparent weekly payouts
🐾

Vet Care Team & Pet Care

Trusted home visits for pets — injections, wound care, medication, post-surgery support — delivered with the same dignity and care.

  • Pet case profiles & scheduling
  • Home injections & wound care
  • IV fluids & post-surgery
  • Same live tracking & payouts
Platform Features

Dependable tools you can trust

Reliable features, built for the real, demanding world of home healthcare.

⚡

Live Operations Dashboard

Every nurse, doctor, patient, and alert — visible in real time the moment you open the app.

🗺️

Live Operations Map

City-wide map showing your staff, doctors, transport, and partner stores — all live.

🩺

Doctor Coordination

Doctors review cases, prescribe remotely, and stay connected with the nursing team on every patient.

👥

Staff & Doctor Management

Full roster with live location, current case, shift status, ratings, and one-click deployment.

📦

Inventory + On-the-Go Refills

Live stock tracking. Staff request refills en route — partner stores dispatch to meet them.

🤖

AI Predictions

Predict supply needs, staffing gaps, and revenue opportunities — before they become problems.

How It Works

Up and running in 24 hours — we handle everything

Register today. Our team calls you on WhatsApp, sets up your dashboard, and gets you live — a dependable start you can count on.

1

Register

A quick 3-minute form. Partner type, zone, team size.

2

WhatsApp Call

Our team calls you within 24 hours to set everything up together.

3

Go Live

Your dashboard is ready. Staff have the app. Bookings begin.

4

Grow Together

AI insights, refills, analytics — we grow alongside you.

Ready to give your team
tools they can trust?

Join as a partner today — always free for partners, no platform fees ever, dependable onboarding in 24 hours, and a live dashboard from day one.

Care. Comfort. Connected. · Hyderabad · Launching Soon
